name: ai-tools-cheatsheets
description: Open-source cheat sheets and team handbook for Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Grok, MCP, prompts, config files, and AI coding workflows.

scripts.docs:build: npm run seo:prepare && honkit build && npm run seo:build
scripts.docs:validate: npm run docs:paths && npm run docs:navigation && npm run docs:metadata && npm run docs:lint && npm run seo:prepare && npm run seo:metadata && npm run docs:build && npm run seo:canonicals && npm run seo:sitemap && npm run seo:structured-data && npm run seo:orphan-pages && npm run docs:links
scripts.seo:validate: npm run seo:prepare && npm run seo:metadata && npm run seo:orphan-pages && npm run docs:build && npm run seo:canonicals && npm run seo:sitemap && npm run seo:structured-data
